slides: Slide 1: We built AI with AI's help (and we're not hiding it)
Slide 2: Most companies use AI as a tool. We use it as a thinking partner.
Slide 3: AI doesn't replace hard decisions. It clarifies them.
Slide 4: The best breakthroughs come from talking TO AI, not AT it.
Slide 5: Taste still matters. Choosing what's right is irreducibly human.
Slide 6: Transparency builds trust. Our users know, and that's why it works.
caption: We're building AI life coaches with AI's help—and we're sharing the real story. No shortcuts, just collaboration. 🌿 What's your experience building with AI? #AI #BuildingInPublic #AILifeCoaching #Transparency #Innovation #TechBuilding #AITools #Collaboration #StartupLife #AICompany #TechTrends #BuildingTogether
